title: Review Panel - Panelist Return Shape (advisory regime)
description: Shape every panel persona MUST return. Single findings array with explicit severity. There is NO binary verdict; the orchestrator does not compute APPROVE/REJECT. Severity expresses signal strength; the synthesizer arbitrates and the human reviewer ships.

persona.description: Persona slug. MUST equal the persona .md filename stem.

findings.description: Findings raised by this persona, ordered by signal strength (most important first). Empty array means no concerns from this lens.

summary.description: One-line takeaway from this persona. Under 200 chars. Required even when findings is empty (e.g. 'No concerns from this lens; ship.').

severity.description: blocking: a correctness regression, security bypass, or fault that compounds. Use sparingly with explicit evidence. recommended: a worthwhile improvement the author should weigh; default for substantive feedback. nit: one-line polish; trivially skippable.

detail.description: WHY this matters. Cite the rule, pattern, or invariant violated.

file.description: Optional repo-relative path to the file.
